problem.title: DLO throughput and accuracy trade-off on the public HDL-400 reference window
problem.question: Which DLO profile should stay as the current default on the public HDL-400 reference window?

dataset.reference_role: public reference trajectory converted from pose_trace.csv

variants.label: KITTI default
variants.intent: Baseline DLO GICP keyframe odometry for KITTI-scale LiDAR.

variants.label: Fast
variants.intent: Coarser downsampling and fewer GICP iterations.

variants.label: Dense
variants.intent: Finer voxels, more map keyframes, and deeper GICP.
